name: Remix: SkillGAP
description: A career path finder and skill gap tracker that delivers highly specific, data-driven guidance. It analyzes a user’s current skills, experience, and goals to identify exact skill gaps, then generates step-by-step, time-bound learning roadmaps. It includes targeted interactive quizzes to assess proficiency, recommends up-to-date tools, courses, and technologies relevant to the chosen field, and provides clear milestones, estimated timelines, and measurable outcomes for each stage of progress.
